metrolook-desc: Metrolook is a responsive skin — inspired fork of the Vector skin. Legacy MaccabiPedia skin; superseded by the Maccabipedia skin (skins/Maccabipedia/) per the Phase 2 cutover.
metrolook.css: /* All CSS here will be loaded for users of the Metrolook skin */
metrolook.js: /* All JavaScript here will be loaded for users of the Metrolook skin */
